name: whaletag
description: WhaleTag - a local-first, offline file manager and tagging tool (Electron + React + TypeScript)

scripts.dev: npm run build:main:dev && npm run build:extensions && concurrently -k "npm run watch:main" "npm run dev:renderer" "wait-on tcp:4002 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electronmon ."
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:extensions && npm run build:renderer
scripts.test: cross-env TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron --test --require ts-node/register --require tsconfig-paths/register --require scripts/test-asset-stub.cjs src/main/atomic-write.test.ts src/main/extension-protocol.test.ts src/main/allowed-roots.test.ts src/main/ebook-annotations.test.ts src/main/sidecar.test.ts src/main/folder-meta.test.ts src/main/thumbnail.test.ts src/main/index-db.test.ts src/main/ebook-cover.test.ts src/main/ebook-convert.test.ts src/main/office-convert.test.ts src/main/office-cache.test.ts src/main/archive.test.ts src/main/exif.test.ts src/main/revisions.test.ts src/main/ipc.test.ts scripts/drawio-smoke.test.ts scripts/verify-drawio-flow.test.ts src/extensions/drawio-editor/drawio-bridge.test.ts src/extensions/drawio-editor/drop-xml.test.ts src/extensions/image-viewer/keymap.test.ts src/extensions/shared/zoom.test.ts src/extensions/shared/pdfjs-in-iframe.test.ts src/extensions/html-viewer/html-stats.test.ts src/extensions/json-viewer/json-model.test.ts src/extensions/text-editor/editor-stats.test.ts src/extensions/md-editor/md-render.test.ts src/extensions/md-editor/md-splitter.test.ts src/extensions/md-editor/md-sandbox.test.ts src/extensions/text-viewer/text-stats.test.ts src/extensions/font-viewer/font-stats.test.ts src/extensions/font-viewer/font-info.test.ts src/extensions/media-player/playlist.test.ts src/extensions/ebook-viewer/plain-text.test.ts src/extensions/ebook-viewer/search-index.test.ts src/extensions/ebook-viewer/annotations-client.test.ts src/shared/gallery.test.ts src/shared/kanban.test.ts src/shared/keybindings.test.ts src/shared/workflow.test.ts src/shared/task-reminder.test.ts src/shared/dedupe-name.test.ts src/shared/file-icon.test.ts src/shared/calendar.test.ts src/shared/folderviz.test.ts src/shared/tagcloud.test.ts src/shared/perspective-prefs.test.ts src/shared/knowledge-graph.test.ts src/shared/mapique.test.ts src/shared/geo-tag.test.ts src/shared/gcj02.test.ts src/shared/tags.test.ts src/shared/tag-colors.test.ts
